  "findings": [
    "Missing load reactor on long motor leads",
    "Risk of reflected wave phenomenon (dv/dt) causing motor insulation breakdown",
    "Non-compliance with manufacturer installation specifications for long cable runs"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an appropriately rated output/load reactor or dv/dt filter between the VFD and the motor",
    "Verify the exact cable length against manufacturer limits to determine if a dv/dt filter or sine-wave filter is required"
  ],
  "rationale": "The installation of long motor leads without a load reactor or dv/dt filter violates manufacturer specifications and poses a high risk of premature motor insulation failure due to transient overvoltages (reflected wave phenomenon).",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430",
    "Manufacturer Installation Manuals (VFD Output Cabling Limits)"
  ]
}
